purpose: Machine-readable overrides for confirmed or high-confidence false-positive conference-logo mappings found during repository audit.

policy.replacement_rule: Use the replacement_source_url only when it is a conference-owned logo/brand asset; otherwise keep no_logo_candidate until manual replacement.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: CoNLL
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: No official logo candidate found; current asset is conference portrait photo metadata.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: No reliable replacement source identified during this audit pass.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: SAT
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: Current asset is unrelated venue image; candidate only exposes AI Journal logo.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: No official SAT conference logo candidate detected.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: AsiaCCS
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: No distinct AsiaCCS logo asset was confirmed; existing file is ACM CCS logo or related asset.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: Page exposes ACM/SIGSAC social/organization logos only.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: BlockSys
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: Highest-confidence candidate was an unrelated CCIS logo asset; no conference-specific logo confirmed.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: No confirmed official replacement logo found from 2026 official page.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: ICIC
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: Cross-conference acronym reuse (ICIC vs ICICS) and no clean official logo candidate.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: Official page assets contain only non-logo/profile-like imagery.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: DFRWS
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: Potentially region-specific APAC asset reused for DFRWS EU 2026.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: EU-specific logo candidate not reliably detected from official page.

high_confidence_manual_review.title: DFRWS
high_confidence_manual_review.risk_reason: Needs visual confirmation whether APAC image is generic or region-specific.
high_confidence_manual_review.recommended_action: Retain no_logo_candidate unless official generic DFRWS logo becomes available.
